DARRYL DUNCAN, President Chief Executive Officer Monongalia Health System, Morgantown,
Duncan served capacity since January 2011.
Health System parent company General Hospital, Preston Memorial Hospital, Monongalia HealthCare Equipment Supplies Village Heritage Point.
Before being named President Duncan served Chief Operating Officer General Hospital 2006-2011.
